title: usecase.Update with --expect-version
acceptance_criteria: Mutators per §15.2: status, priority, title, description, due, add-tag, remove-tag, add-impact-file, remove-impact-file, add-dep, remove-dep, add-acceptance, remove-acceptance, risk.
Status mutations call domain.ValidTransition; illegal transitions return ErrInvalidStatus.
Usecase sets Item.UpdatedAt = clock.Now() and Item.Version = old.Version + 1 before calling Store.Put. ExpectVersion threads through; conflict returns ErrVersionConflict (no retry — caller decides).
Returns prev_version and new_version in the output struct.
